1110001100101010 0011011000101011 1 -> sum: 0001100101010110, cout: 1
0000001101111111 1001010001001011 1 -> sum: 1001011111001011, cout: 0
0010000001010000 0010110011010001 0 -> sum: 0100110100100001, cout: 0
0000111011010000 0001011111010100 0 -> sum: 0010011010100100, cout: 0
1100000000000110 1011001101111000 0 -> sum: 0111001101111110, cout: 1

0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
